title: chore(deps): update react
summary: Renovate bot PR that bumps react/react-dom from ^19.2.3 to ^19.2.4, @types/react to ^19.2.14, @types/react-dom to ^19.2.3, and @ast-grep/napi from 0.41.0 to 0.41.1 (in lockfile). Patch-level updates across 5 package.json files and pnpm-lock.yaml. React 19.2.4 includes DoS mitigations and hardening for Server Components/Actions.
maintainerNotes: Approved by wardpeet and auto-approved by github-actions many times as Renovate rebases. CI has failures: 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' fail, 'changeset' check fails (expected for Renovate PRs), and 'Memory Tests'/'E2E Tests' are still pending. Build, lint, and validation checks all pass. The test failures should be investigated to determine if they are flaky/pre-existing or caused by these dependency bumps before merging. Automerge is enabled by Renovate config.
